# AI Ethics, Human Rights, and Public Accountability Audit Checklist

- [ ] Public purpose is documented.
- [ ] Rights-impact assessment is complete.
- [ ] Affected groups are identified.
- [ ] Marginalized or vulnerable groups are specifically considered.
- [ ] Necessity and proportionality are assessed.
- [ ] Non-AI alternatives were considered.
- [ ] Data sources and proxies are reviewed.
- [ ] Disparity monitoring is active.
- [ ] Burden monitoring is active.
- [ ] Explanation is provided to affected people.
- [ ] Appeal pathway is accessible.
- [ ] Remedy is available and tracked.
- [ ] Human oversight is meaningful.
- [ ] Public reporting is available where appropriate.
- [ ] Stakeholder participation is documented.
- [ ] Vendor obligations are documented.
- [ ] Incident reporting is active.
- [ ] Decommissioning criteria exist.
